      About this item

      • PRE-ORDER BUNDLE: Get an Amazon Gift Card when you order Samsung Galaxy Watch9. Select the gift card bundle variation for redemption. Gift card may ship separately. Ends 8/6.
      • TRACK HEALTH PATTERNS¹ IN YOUR SLEEP WITH VITALS²: Stay aware of the subtle changes in your body with Vitals¹–it tracks health metrics while you sleep, catches shifts from your usual patterns, and provides tailored guidance based on the insights.²
      • A PERSONALIZED COACH FOR YOUR FITNESS GOALS: Whether you're building endurance for a long trek or training to build muscle, Fitness Index³ delivers tailored guidance based on your fitness level goals. Finally, train smarter with your fitness watch.
      • EVERYDAY AI ASSISTANCE, SIMPLIFIED: With the Galaxy Watch9, you can just raise your wrist, start talking naturally and get instant AI assistance⁴—no wake phrase needed. This smart watch won’t slow you down.
      • ONE PERSONALIZED SCORE TO KNOW YOUR HEART BETTER: Instead of checking multiple metrics separately, track the single Heart Health Score⁵ based on sleep time, BMI, activity and vascular load to stay aware of your wellness.
      • TRACK YOUR NIGHTS. OWN YOUR DAYS: Galaxy Watch9 gives you personalized recommendations and habit-building guidance with Advanced Sleep Coaching.⁶ Plus, Bedtime Guidance⁷ helps you find your optimal bedtime so you can wake up feeling refreshed.
      • CHECK YOUR BLOOD PRESSURE EASILY: Stay aware of your blood pressure conveniently with your smart watch. Simply calibrate your Galaxy Watch9 using a blood pressure cuff (sold separately) to measure your systolic and diastolic pressure.⁸
      • COMFORTABLE WEAR. FORGET IT’S THERE: A watch meant for daily health tracking should be comfortable enough for daily wear. The unbelievably soft sports band with a breathable air pocket design never gets in the way of your goals.
      • NEED TO PAY? YOUR WRIST WORKS: From post-run coffee stops to everyday errands, use Tap to Pay⁹ on your Galaxy Watch9 and keep your essentials right where you need them — on your wrist.
      • WATCH PAIRS WITH YOUR ANDROID SMARTPHONE: Galaxy Watch works seamlessly with Samsung phones and also works with other Android phones.¹⁰ Download the Galaxy Wearable and Samsung Health apps to get started using Galaxy Watch with your device.

      • What colors do Galaxy Watch9 come in?

        Galaxy Watch9 is available in different colors based on the size option. 40mm model: Available in Cream and Graphite. 44mm model: Available in Silver and Graphite

      • How much larger is the Galaxy Watch9 battery compared to Galaxy Watch8?

        The 40mm model has a 390 mAh battery, and the 44mm model has a 445 mAh battery. The higher capacity allows Galaxy Watch9 to require less frequent charging. This means you can keep the Watch powered throughout the day with minimal downtime.

      • What kind of processor does Galaxy Watch9 use?

        Galaxy Watch9 uses the Snapdragon Wear Elite Platform. This advanced processor delivers smooth, seamless performance with less lag or load. Also, it supports quick app launches and fluid, responsive interactions.

      • Does Galaxy Watch9 have a clear display?

        Galaxy Watch9 features a sapphire crystal display that delivers a brightness level of up to 3,000 nits, ensuring clear visibility even in bright sunlight. The high-resolution screen provides crisp visuals for notifications, apps and health data.

      • How does Galaxy Watch9 calculate my Fitness Index?

        Galaxy Watch9 calculates your Fitness Index³ by analyzing your body composition and workout history. Get a personalized fitness score that reflects your current physical performance and health data.

      Disclaimer

      ¹Requires a compatible Samsung Galaxy phone, Health app and Samsung account. Requires initial setup wearing watch for 7 out of 28 nights. ²The Vitals software functions are not intended for use in the diagnosis of disease or other conditions, or in the cure, mitigation, treatment or prevention of disease. ³Requires initial setup with compatible Android phone, Samsung account and Samsung Health app. Premium content (optional) powered by iFit requires paid subscription. ⁴Requires initial pairing with an eligible Android smartphone and separate qualifying wireless plan. Your carrier may not support stand-alone voice calling, or support may be available only in certain areas. Check with your carrier. Standalone functionality limited if paired phone is not powered on or connected to a wireless network. ⁵Requires a compatible Samsung Galaxy phone, Samsung Health app and Samsung account. Some features require initial setup process. ⁶Must wear watch for 3 consecutive nights and set optimal wake-up time in the Samsung Health app. ⁷Requires a compatible Samsung Galaxy phone, Health app and Samsung account. Some features require initial setup process. Premium content (optional) powered by iFit requires paid subscription. ⁸Requires initial and periodic calibrations every 28 days using a third-party blood pressure cuff, sold separately. Read and follow instructions to calibrate the blood pressure function. Compatible with Android OS version 12 or later, Watch/Wear OS version 4.0 or later. ⁹Setup required. Check responses. Compatibility and availability varies. Google and Gemini are trademarks of Google LLC. ¹⁰Certain features not available with non-Samsung Android mobile devices, such as certain AI features including Energy Score insight, and ECG, Sleep Apnea, Do Not Disturb and Bedtime Sync. See samsung.com/us/support/answer/ANS10004668/ to learn more about feature compatibility with non-Samsung Android devices. ¹¹Available for outdoor running only; requires at least 12 minutes of running with GPS on and initial setup. Galaxy AI features track data and require compatible Samsung Galaxy phone, Samsung Health app and Samsung account. ¹²Setup required. Check responses. Compatibility and availability varies. Google and Gemini are trademarks of Google LLC. ¹³Requires a compatible NFC card from a participating bank. See Samsung.com Wallet FAQ for more information.

      Product Description

      Galaxy Watch9 makes staying on top of your everyday health easy, especially with its comfortable design that’s perfect for daily wear.

      ¹Requires a compatible Samsung Galaxy phone, Health app and Samsung account. Requires initial setup wearing watch for 7 out of 28 nights.

      ²The Vitals software functions are not intended for use in the diagnosis of disease or other conditions, or in the cure, mitigation, treatment or prevention of disease.

      ³Requires initial setup with compatible Android phone, Samsung account and Samsung Health app. Premium content (optional) powered by iFitrequires paid subscription.

      ⁴Setup required. Check responses. Compatibility and availability varies. Google and Gemini are trademarks of Google LLC.

      ⁵Requires a compatible Samsung Galaxy phone, Health app and Samsung account. Requires initial setup wearing watch for 24 hours (including awake and asleep). The Heart Health Score software functions are not intended for use in the diagnosis of disease or other conditions, or in the cure, mitigation, treatment or prevention of disease.

      ⁶Must wear watch for 3 consecutive nights and set optimal wake-up time in the Samsung Health app.

      ⁷Requires a compatible Samsung Galaxy phone, Health app and Samsung account. Some features require initial setup process.

      ⁸Requires initial and periodic calibrations every 28 days using a third-party blood pressure cuff, sold separately. Read and follow instructions to calibrate the blood pressure function.

      ⁹Requires a compatible NFC card from a participating bank. See Samsung.com Wallet FAQ for more information.

      ¹⁰Certain features not available with non-Samsung Android mobile devices, such as certain AI features including Energy Score insight, and ECG, Sleep Apnea, Do Not Disturb and Bedtime Sync. See samsung.com/us/support/answer/ANS10004668/ to learn more about feature compatibility with non-Samsung Android devices.

      How customer reviews and ratings work

      Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      About this Item

      • PRE-ORDER BUNDLE: Get an Amazon Gift Card when you order Samsung Galaxy Watch9. Select the gift card bundle variation for redemption. Gift card may ship separately. Ends 8/6.

      • A PERSONALIZED COACH FOR YOUR FITNESS GOALS: Whether you're building endurance for a long trek or training to build muscle, Fitness Index³ delivers tailored guidance based on your fitness level goals. Finally, train smarter with your fitness watch.

      • WATCH PAIRS WITH YOUR ANDROID SMARTPHONE: Galaxy Watch works seamlessly with Samsung phones and also works with other Android phones.¹⁰ Download the Galaxy Wearable and Samsung Health apps to get started using Galaxy Watch with your device.

      Product Description

      Galaxy Watch9 makes staying on top of your everyday health easy, especially with its comfortable design that’s perfect for daily wear.

      ¹Requires a compatible Samsung Galaxy phone, Health app and Samsung account. Requires initial setup wearing watch for 7 out of 28 nights.

      ²The Vitals software functions are not intended for use in the diagnosis of disease or other conditions, or in the cure, mitigation, treatment or prevention of disease.

      ³Requires initial setup with compatible Android phone, Samsung account and Samsung Health app. Premium content (optional) powered by iFitrequires paid subscription.

      ⁴Setup required. Check responses. Compatibility and availability varies. Google and Gemini are trademarks of Google LLC.

      ⁵Requires a compatible Samsung Galaxy phone, Health app and Samsung account. Requires initial setup wearing watch for 24 hours (including awake and asleep). The Heart Health Score software functions are not intended for use in the diagnosis of disease or other conditions, or in the cure, mitigation, treatment or prevention of disease.

      ⁶Must wear watch for 3 consecutive nights and set optimal wake-up time in the Samsung Health app.

      ⁷Requires a compatible Samsung Galaxy phone, Health app and Samsung account. Some features require initial setup process.

      ⁸Requires initial and periodic calibrations every 28 days using a third-party blood pressure cuff, sold separately. Read and follow instructions to calibrate the blood pressure function.

      ⁹Requires a compatible NFC card from a participating bank. See Samsung.com Wallet FAQ for more information.

      ¹⁰Certain features not available with non-Samsung Android mobile devices, such as certain AI features including Energy Score insight, and ECG, Sleep Apnea, Do Not Disturb and Bedtime Sync. See samsung.com/us/support/answer/ANS10004668/ to learn more about feature compatibility with non-Samsung Android devices.
